title: AppWorkloads
content:
# AppWorkloads

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### apply_workloads(data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadsApply, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Initiate final deploy action for the downloaded Workloads. Only valid for Workloads that were previously deployed with the keys `staged` set to true and `instantly_apply` set to false.


### update_workloads_bulk(data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadsBulkUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Update Workloads Bulk


### create_workload(stopped: Optional[bool], data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadCreate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.WorkloadCreate

Create Workload


### delete_workloads(staged: Optional[bool], data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadsDelete, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Delete Workload


### list_workloads(search: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_names: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_versions: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_types: Optional[Sequence[str]], cluster_names: Optional[Sequence[str]], node_names: Optional[Sequence[str]], workload_names: Optional[Sequence[str]], resources: Optional[str], staged: Optional[bool], statuses: Optional[Sequence[str]], download_statuses: Optional[Sequence[str]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[type.WorkloadSummary], responses.WorkloadsListPaginatedResponseCursor]

List Workloads


### start_workloads(data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadsStart, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

**Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.workload.update`.


### stop_workloads(data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadsStop, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

**Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.workload.update`.


### download_workload(workload_name: str, address: Optional[bool], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> str

Download the Workload package file for offline installation on the Edge System. The system automatically generates the file for download if the package is not already available.


### get_workload(workload_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.WorkloadGet

Retrieve the parameters of a Workload.


### get_workload_logs(workload_name: str, tail_lines: Optional[int], since_time: Optional[datetime], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.WorkloadLogsGet

Get Workload Logs


### update_workload(workload_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadUpdate, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.WorkloadUpdate

Update Workload


### add_workload_resources(workload_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadResourcesAdd, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.WorkloadResourcesAdd

Add WorkloadResources


### remove_workload_resources(workload_name: str, data: Optional[Union[requests.WorkloadResourcesRemove, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Remove WorkloadResources

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.app_workloads.apply_workloads()
